overall.description: A first-person perspective drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city street during a rainy dusk. The camera moves steadily from an open multi-lane road lined with towering glass buildings and glowing digital billboards into a covered urban corridor beneath overhead walkways. The wet asphalt reflects vibrant neon advertisements, and futuristic vehicles pass by, characteristic of high-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic multi-lane urban street with towering digital billboards

events.description: approaching and entering the covered overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the right side of the wet multi-lane street, approaching the covered section

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with multiple glowing digital billboards and reflective glass facade
tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying red and white graphics on building facade
distinctive tree with bright red autumn foliage planted in a concrete planter on the sidewalk
low yellow painted wall separating the road from the pedestrian walkway
rain-slicked multi-lane road surface reflecting colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings
large concrete overpass structure spanning the road ahead with digital screens mounted underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street during a rainy dusk, with towering glass buildings covered in digital billboards lining the left side. The camera drives forward along the wet asphalt, passing a distinctive red-leafed tree on the right. A futuristic sports car overtakes on the left as the camera approaches a large concrete overpass structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban corridor beneath overhead walkways and digital billboards

events.description: entering the covered area blocks natural dusk light, creating an artificial neon-lit environment

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward through the covered section beneath concrete overpasses and support pillars

entered.detail: massive concrete pedestrian bridge with rust stains and mounted digital advertising screens
large horizontal screen displaying 'TOUGH MORNING' advertisement with a character image
thick cylindrical concrete column with yellow painted base supporting the overhead structure
modern building wall with horizontal windows and digital signage facing the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered urban corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses, transitioning from mixed natural light to artificial neon illumination. The space is defined by thick support pillars on the right and building facades on the left, with large digital billboards mounted overhead. The wet road continues to reflect the colorful artificial lighting as the camera drives steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep covered urban corridor approaching distant exit

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the covered corridor toward the visible exit opening in the distance

entered.detail: opening at the end of the covered section with visible natural light and cityscape beyond

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the deep covered corridor, with concrete walls and overhead walkways creating an enclosed urban canyon. Multiple digital billboards line the route overhead, while the wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting. The segment ends as the camera approaches a distant opening where natural light becomes visible, suggesting an exit from the covered area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a rainy cyberpunk city, transitioning from an open boulevard into a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins on a wide street lined with towering glass buildings and digital billboards, passing a red-leafed tree as a futuristic sports car speeds past on the left. As the camera approaches a massive concrete overpass, the environment shifts from the dim natural light of dusk into a covered corridor defined by thick support pillars and overhead walkways. The scene then deepens into an enclosed urban canyon where the wet asphalt reflects a dense array of artificial neon advertisements mounted above. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression through the concrete depths before turning toward a distant opening where natural light reappears at the exit.
